ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator responsible for the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project this experiment belongs to */,
  "equipment_list" TEXT /* List of equipment used in the experiment */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., in_progress, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("principal_investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the principal investigator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the principal investigator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the principal investigator belongs to */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the principal investigator */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Description of the principal investigator's research focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data was collected */,
  "vp" INTEGER /* Value of parameter vp at the given time */,
  "ai" REAL /* Value of parameter AI at the given time */,
  "rc" INTEGER /* Value of parameter Rc at the given time */,
  "t_synth_1" REAL /* Value of parameter t_synth_1 at the given time */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of environmental conditions */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the conditions apply to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the experiment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the experiment */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure during the experiment */,
  "atmospheric_conditions" TEXT /* Description of atmospheric conditions during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., scientist, technician) */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the operator */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift schedule of the operator (e.g., day, night) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_equipment" (
  "experiment_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between an experiment and equipment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the experiment */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the equipment during the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_equipment_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_operators" (
  "experiment_operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between an experiment and an operator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the experiment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_operators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_operators_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES experiment_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal or publication venue */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the collaboration is associated with */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first researcher in the collaboration */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second researcher in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaboration (e.g., co-author, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the funding is associated with */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Funding agency */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of funding */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
